fields.text: This will completely reset the board and start a new game. Are you sure?

default.text-shadow: ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY outlineColor}, -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY outlineColor}, ${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY outlineColor}, -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px -${PROPERTY textShadowDistance}px ${PROPERTY textShadowBlur}px ${PROPERTY outlineColor}

elseRoutine.header: Are you sure you want to remove ${PROPERTY player} from this seat?

fields.label: Remove this player from their seat

pro.textA: Add +3 if you only have 1 tile. Remove +3 if you add a 2nd tile.
pro.textB: Add +3 to each unique number. Remove +3 if a matching number is played.

rocker.textB: Place a tile and other players with any tiles gain $1.

showgirl.textA: Place a tile during your first turn and gain $2.
showgirl.textB: Place the highest tile left in your hand and gain $2.

whale.textA: Place a tile and add $1 to this casino.
whale.textB: Place a tile and add $2 to another casino.

owner.textA: Previous leader gains $2 when lead changes.
owner.textB: Add $2 to this casino when leader changes.

comedian.textA: If casino is honest, everyone but leader is paid double.
comedian.textB: If casino is honest, move $3 of leading team's winnings to this casino.

roller.textB: When placing a tile, move $2 between any 2 casinos.

singer.textA: Leader ties are allowed and winnings split evenly (round down).
singer.textB: If 2nd-ranked player is not tied, they earn 50% of the leader's winnings (from supply).

fields.text: This will completely setup the board and start a new round. Are you sure?

thenRoutine: // MAKE ALL RESOURCE TYPE WIDGETS HIDDEN
